query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "evopolicygym: evaluating autonomous policy evolution in interactive en" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) and (b) as it addresses the core mechanism of "autonomous policy evolution" and "interactive environments" by proposing methods to learn and align agent value systems through inverse reinforcement learning in sequential decision-making domains, which is a foundational component of the user's research topic on evaluating autonomous policy evolution.
